chapter_title: Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties

(a) The peace officer or toll road agent who alleges a violation is not required to attend the hearing.

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 284. Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties
##### § 284.207 — Attendance on Hearing

(a) The peace officer or toll road agent who alleges a violation is not required to attend the hearing.

(b) The failure of a person charged with an offense to appear at the hearing is considered an admission of liability for the violation.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.18(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The peace officer or toll road agent who alleges a violation is not required to attend the hearing.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The failure of a person charged with an offense to appear at the hearing is considered an admission of liability for the violation.
